summary: Theme testing completed for light/dark mode switcher. All athlete pages tested in both themes with theme toggle working correctly. Fixed 1 bug in CalendarPage.js (undefined activeFilter variable). All pages render correctly in both light and dark themes with proper text contrast.

ui_bugs.issue: activeFilter variable was undefined on line 360, causing runtime error preventing page from loading

issues: Minor: Some text elements (lines 101-102, 94, 116) have hardcoded 'text-white' classes which may need review for light mode consistency, though drawer background is dark so not a critical issue

critical_code_review_comments: CalendarPage.js had a bug where activeFilter and type variables were used but not defined - this was fixed
All pages now properly use CSS theme variables (--cm-bg, --cm-surface, --cm-text, --cm-border, etc.)
Theme toggle button in TopBar correctly toggles 'dark' class on document.documentElement
ThemeContext.js properly persists theme choice to localStorage
context_for_next_testing_agent: Light/Dark theme switching is working correctly on all athlete pages. The theme toggle button is in the TopBar with data-testid='theme-toggle-btn'. CSS variables are defined in index.css under :root (light) and .dark (dark) selectors. CalendarPage bug was fixed by removing undefined activeFilter variable reference.

Theme_Toggle.light_to_dark: PASS - clicking sun icon switches to dark mode
Theme_Toggle.dark_to_light: PASS - clicking moon icon switches to light mode

Dashboard_Page.dark_mode: PASS - all text visible with proper contrast
